description_long: This is a pair of adjustable pliers, commonly known as groove joint or channel lock pliers, featuring two elongated handles coated in blue rubber or plastic for improved grip and comfort. The handles are straight with a slight ergonomic curve near the joint, and the jaws are offset and feature a multi-groove slip-joint mechanism that allows for adjustable jaw width. The jaws themselves are serrated for enhanced gripping power and have a curved profile, making them suitable for gripping round objects like pipes or irregularly shaped items. The metal body is exposed at the jaws and pivot, showing a matte, slightly rough metallic finish, while the handles are covered in a smooth, grippy blue material. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool, and the overall construction suggests durability and utility for various urban repair or maintenance tasks.
description: A pair of blue-handled, adjustable groove joint pliers with serrated jaws and a slip-joint mechanism. The handles are coated for grip, and the jaws are designed for versatile gripping tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue handles and the offset, serrated jaws with the slip-joint mechanism clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile of the pliers and the alignment of the handles and jaws.
description_view_2: Reverse side view displaying the back of the jaws and the continuous blue handle coating, with the slip-joint mechanism partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the length and parallel alignment of the handles, as well as the thickness of the jaw area.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, slightly curved, insulated with blue rubber or plastic for ergonomic grip.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved, serrated jaws with a multi-groove slip-joint for adjustable width; designed for gripping round or irregular objects.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Slip-joint mechanism with multiple grooves, allowing adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth, rubberized coating on handles for enhanced grip.
